winning_test.source:
import gradebook.analytics as analytics


def test_exact_float_upper_bound_is_returned_unchanged():
    value = float("100")

    result = analytics.clamp_percent(value)

    assert result is value
winning_test.targeted_behavior: An input exactly at the inclusive upper bound must be returned unchanged, including its type and identity; only values greater than 100 are clamped.
